findings.evidence: `roadmap/TauCetiRoadmap/Multiquadratic/README.md:14-17` says the multiquadratic machinery comes from `kim-em/erdos-unit-distance` and to credit it in each ported file; `GaloisGroup.lean:31-36` credits that source for analysed sign-change automorphisms, while `SignChange.lean:9-29` has no provenance section.
findings.fix: Add a short `## Provenance` note in the module doc crediting `kim-em/erdos-unit-distance`/Alpöge, or explicitly state that this file is a wrapper around the already-credited `GaloisGroup` construction.
findings.issue: The file packages the sign-change automorphisms named in the roadmap/source lineage without crediting that source in the code.

summary: The new sign-change API follows the multiquadratic machinery that the roadmap and imported Galois-group file identify as migrated/generalized from erdos-unit-distance, but the new file has no provenance note of its own.
